# branch_stats.branch_expected_stats { #tslai.branch_stats.branch_expected_stats }

```python
tslai.branch_stats.branch_expected_stats(Q, t, xi)
```

Endpoint-conditioned expected dwell times and jump counts on one branch.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   CTMC generator (rows sum to zero).

<code>[**t**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Branch length (> 0). Root branches (length 0 by tskit convention) must be skipped by the caller (CLAUDE.md §3.4, §4.5); ``t <= 0`` returns zeros.

<code>[**xi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Posterior over ``(parent_state, child_state)`` for this branch, normalised to sum to 1. The branch's span weight is applied separately by the accumulator (CLAUDE.md §3.3).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[**dwell**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected time spent in each state along the branch, under ``xi``. Sums to ``t`` for any normalised ``xi`` (a useful invariant).

<code>[**jumps**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Expected number of ``m -> n`` transitions (``m != n``), under ``xi``.
